mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_BOARD_CMNT_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO BOARD_CMNT ( CMNT_NO, POST_NO, PARENT_CMNT_NO, COMMENT_LVL, COMMENT_CN, WRITER_EMP_NO, DEL_YN, REG_DTM ) VALUES ( #{cmntNo}, #{postNo}, #{parentCmntNo}, #{commentLvl}, #{commentCn}, #{writerEmpNo}, 'N', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT CMNT_NO, POST_NO, PARENT_CMNT_NO, COMMENT_LVL, COMMENT_CN, WRITER_EMP_NO, DEL_YN, REG_DTM FROM BOARD_CMNT WHERE POST_NO = #{postNo} ORDER BY NVL(PARENT_CMNT_NO, CMNT_NO), REG_DTM
